## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and related context.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Code cleanup or refactoring

## Related Issues

Closes #(issue number)

## Testing

Describe how you tested the changes:

- [ ] Ran `python 1_generate_data.py` successfully
- [ ] Ran `python 2_train_evaluate.py` successfully
- [ ] No new warnings or errors
- [ ] Added/updated tests (if applicable)

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] Comments have been added for non-obvious changes
- [ ] Documentation has been updated (if applicable)
- [ ] No new warnings have been generated
- [ ] Tested locally and confirmed to work

## Screenshots

(If applicable, add screenshots showing the changes)

## Additional Context

Any additional information that reviewers should know?
